description: Balanced public health resilience across prevention detection continuity workforce governance trust equity and implementation burden.
Prioritizes preventing avoidable burden before crisis.
Prioritizes surveillance laboratories early warning diagnostics and situational awareness.
Prioritizes preserving essential public health and healthcare services under disruption.
Prioritizes staffing depth worker safety surge capacity training and retention.
Prioritizes trusted communication community legitimacy and misinformation resilience.
Prioritizes vulnerable populations fair resource distribution access and community authority.
Penalizes strategies with higher implementation burden when administrative capacity is constrained.
